titleStmt.title: SII 26.44: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 44. (A.R. No. 43 of 1909.) KUṈṈAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Madhunadīśvara shrine at the foot of the hill.
This damaged record describes the king as Śōṇāḍu-koṇḍu Muḍikoṇḍaśoḷapurattu vīrābhishēkam paṇṇiyaruḷiya.

It seems to record a gift of lands in Tirukkuṉṟakkuḍi, made tax-free, for food offerings to god Uḍaiyār Tēnāṟṟu-Nāyakar of Tirukkuṉṟakkuḍi, by Gaṇḍaṉ Udaiyañcheydāṉ alias (name lost), probably Gāṅgēyaṉ, the same as the one figuring in No. 41 above, of Niyamam, one of the villages irrigated by (the river) Tēnāṟu in Kēraḷasiṅga-vaḷanāḍu. The lands are stated to have been previously sold to a person named Tiruttaḷikōdai alias Vikkiramapāṇḍyapaṉmaṉ of Niyamam, by Gaṇḍaṉ Udayañcheydāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ coṉāṭu koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻapurattu virābhi
ṣekam paṇṇiyaruḷiya yadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 7vatu keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭut teṉāṟṟuppokku niyamattu ka
ṇṭaṉ Utaiyañ ceytā ṉeṉ meṟpaṭiyūr tiruttaḷikotaiyāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyapaṉmaṉukku tirukkuṉṟa
kkuṭivayalil nām Ivaṉukku viṟṟa muṉ jivitamāṉa nilaṅkāṇi ṇi nilam Araimāmuntirikaiyum I ṉ pattu
ṭaval nilam kāṇikkiḻmukkā yakkal nilam kāṇiaraikkāṇikkiḻ mukkālum pākan vayakkal nilam Araimā Araikki
ḻaraikkālum māmaṇivaya mukkāṇimuntirikaikkiḻaraiyum periyaṉiki vayakkal nilam kāṇiaraikkāṇimuntiri
kaiyum kā colai nilam Araimā Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiyum kāntaṉ vayakkal nilam Araimā muntirikaiyum
natta vayakkal nilam nālumā varaikkum Iṟukkak kaṭava kaṭamai Accuvari Antarāyam cilvari peruvari veṭṭimuṭṭam Āḷ
Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟai kuṭimaikaḷuṉ tavintu Uṭaiyār tirukkuṉṟākkuṭi teṉāṟṟu ṉāyaṉārukku tiru Amutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa
ḷakuṭitāṅkiyeṉṉuṅkolāl nilamaḷantu Ikkolāl nilam On I viḷainta nilattukku
kala nellum Añcumeṉi Oru tiramamum Aṟpikai ntu ku māttā Irukala nellu
koṭai Eḷ tiṉai varaku viḷainta ṉilattu m kiḻ Iṭṭukku
kaḻivuṉikki nilam Oru māvukku candrādityava
rai celvatāka kuṭuttom Iṉṉāyaṉār tiru mu
Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṇṭaṉ
[śrī] muventa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cūrateva muventa veḷān Eḻuttu § Itu śrī māheśvara rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
